description: Composition Brown T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a round neck, short sleeves and flock print on the front Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash at 40 degrees Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Tumble dry normal or line dry Warm iron Sport your style in ease with this vintage T-shirt from locomotive. Crafted from soft cotton fabric, this T-shirt offers exemplary comfort. Pair it with jeans and sneakers. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
